title: Infosys Finacle to modernize Producers Savings Bank’s core banking and loan origination systems
detailed_summary: Infosys Finacle, part of EdgeVerve Systems, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Infosys, announced that Producers Savings Bank Corporation in the Philippines will upgrade to the latest version of the Finacle Core Banking Solution and implement the Finacle Origination Solution. The initiative is intended to modernize the bank’s technology landscape, strengthen its digital foundation, improve operational resilience, support digital loan management for SMEs and retail customers, and enable API-based integration with the fintech ecosystem. No contract value, duration, revenue impact, or implementation timeline was disclosed.

key_facts.fact: Infosys Finacle and Producers Savings Bank Corporation announced that the bank will upgrade to the latest version of the Finacle Core Banking Solution.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Finacle to Power Digital Transformation for Producers Savings Bank Corporation in the Philippines

key_facts.fact: Producers Savings Bank Corporation will implement the Finacle Origination Solution to grow its lending business for small and medium enterprises and retail customers.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Finacle to Power Digital Transformation for Producers Savings Bank Corporation in the Philippines

key_facts.fact: The upgraded Finacle platform includes a comprehensive API suite intended to help the bank integrate with the fintech ecosystem and roll out new offerings for underbanked and unbanked communities.
The document states that Infosys Finacle and Producers Bank have had a decade-long association.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Finacle to Power Digital Transformation for Producers Savings Bank Corporation in the Philippines
